description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named build. Add a rust-latest job that runs in the build stage using the rust:latest Docker image and executes 'cargo build --verbose' followed by 'cargo test --verbose'. Add a rust-nightly job also in the build stage, using the rustlang/rust:nightly image, runs the same two cargo commands, and is marked allow_failure so its failure does not fail the pipeline. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
